verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Thank you for the cross The mighty cross That God Himself Should die for such as us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And everyday we're changed Into your image more and more And it's by the cross We're truly been transformed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're so amazed And we give you praise For You have saved us For such a cost

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We're so amazed Ang we give You praise For the Power of the Cross For the Power of the Cross
